---
title: "NLP_draft1"
author: "Daniel"
format: html
editor: visual
---
## Packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(haven)
library(tidytext)
library(rvest)
library(janitor)
```

## Loading Data
```{r}
speech_sample_5 <- read.csv("data/Carney 5 speech sample.csv")
```

## Top Word Frequency from First 5 Speeches from PM Website - manual scraping
```{r}
word_counts <- speech_sample_5 |>
  unnest_tokens(word, text) |>
  anti_join(stop_words, by = "word") |>
  count(word, sort = TRUE)

top_words <- word_counts |>
  slice_max(n, n = 20)

top_words |>
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(word, n), y = n)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  labs(
    title = "Most Frequent Words in Carney First 5 Speech Sample",
    x = "Word",
    y = "Frequency"
  )
```

## Scraping
```{r}
speech_urls <- read.csv("Data/carney_speech_urls.csv")

scrape_pm_speech <- function(url) {
  
  page <- read_html(url)
  
  # Get the real title, not accessibility/navigation headings
  title <- page |>
    html_elements("h1") |>
    html_text2() |>
    str_squish() |>
    discard(~ str_to_lower(.x) %in% c("main container", "navigation")) |>
    first()
  
  # Get all visible page text
  all_text <- page |>
    html_text2()
  
  # Remove everything before the speech body
  speech_text <- all_text |>
    str_remove("(?s).*?\\b[A-Z][a-z]+ \\d{1,2}, \\d{4}\\s+[A-Za-z ,]+\\s+") |>
    str_remove("(?s)\\*\\s+\\*\\s+\\*\\s+\\*.*") |>
    str_squish()
  
  tibble(
    title = title,
    source = "Prime Minister of Canada",
    source_type = "speech",
    text = speech_text
  )
}
carney_speeches_raw <- speech_urls |>
  mutate(data = map(url, scrape_pm_speech)) |>
  unnest(data)

carney_speeches <- carney_speeches_raw |>
  mutate(
    date = str_extract(url, "\\d{4}/\\d{2}/\\d{2}"),
    date = ymd(str_replace_all(date, "/", "-"))
  ) |>
  select(date, title, url, source, source_type, text)

write_csv(carney_speeches, "data/carney_pm_speeches_raw.csv")
```
